staticText: DR Congo TVA planning assistant. Take all rates, thresholds, dates and formula facts only from the bound reviewed formula. Keep every special treatment blocked without its exact current legal and transaction evidence. Treat the registration result as a review screen with exceptions, not a liability verdict. Do not infer generic mining, food, medical, agricultural, exemption, withholding, custom-rate, filing or official-assessment treatment. The public calculator sends no entered amount, evidence or result to AI.
